mapper.select: SELECT d.data_id as dataId, d.contract, d.gym_id as gymId, d.receiver_id as receiverId, d.receiver_name as receiverName, d.status, d.amount, d.quantity, d.start_date as startDate, d.end_date as endDate FROM "h_contract_data" d WHERE d.data_id = #{dataId} AND d.sender_id = #{username} AND d.status = 'SIGNED' AND d.contract IN (3, 4, 5) AND d.data_id NOT IN ( SELECT data_id FROM "h_payment" WHERE data_id IS NOT NULL )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO "h_pay" (data_id, username, p_price, coupon_id, p_name, created_at) VALUES (#{dataId}, #{username}, #{pPrice}, #{couponId}, #{pName}, #{createdAt})
